\tzpentry{ID3896}{Acoustic Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3896 introduces Acoustic Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{\mu\nu}^{\text{acoustic}} = \frac{\rho_0}{c_s}\begin{pmatrix} -(c_s^2 - v^2) & -\mathbf{v}^T \\ -\mathbf{v} & \mathbb{I} \end{pmatrix} \end{equation}
